abilities.description: Gain +1 . This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn.Upgraded: Gain +1 . This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn, and after each time you spend mana on another spell.

translation.ru_description: Получите +1 [img:shield]. Первое применение за ход стоит 0 маны.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите +1 [img:shield]. Стоит 0 маны первый раз за ход И каждый раз после траты маны на другое заклинание.
translation.en_description: Gain +1 [img:shield]. This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain +1 [img:shield]. This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn, and after each time you spend mana on another spell.

abilities.description: Your basic attack inflicts Bruise until the end of the turn. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Your basic attack inflicts Bruise until the end of the turn.

translation.ru_description:
Ваша базовая атака накладывает Ушиб до конца хода.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Ваша базовая атака накладывает Ушиб до конца хода.
translation.en_description:
Your basic attack inflicts Bruise until the end of the turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description: Your basic attack inflicts Bruise until the end of the turn.

abilities.description: Roll up to 4 tiles diagonally.Upgraded: Roll up to 4 tiles diagonally or in a straight line.

translation.ru_description: Перекатитесь до 4 клеток по диагонали.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Перекатитесь до 4 клеток по диагонали или по прямой.
translation.en_description: Roll up to 4 tiles diagonally.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Roll up to 4 tiles diagonally or in a straight line.

abilities.description: Until end of turn, your basic attack emits +1 Sparkle.Upgraded: Until end of turn, your basic attack emits +1 Sparkle. Refresh your basic attack.

translation.ru_description: До конца хода ваша базовая атака испускает +1 Искру.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
До конца хода ваша базовая атака испускает +1 Искру.
Обновите базовую атаку.
translation.en_description: Until end of turn, your basic attack emits +1 Sparkle.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Until end of turn, your basic attack emits +1 Sparkle.
Refresh your basic attack.

abilities.description: Begin charging a spirit bomb. This ability becomes Throw Spirit Bomb. Allies gain the bonus ability Donate Energy until you throw it.Upgraded: Begin charging a spirit bomb. This ability becomes Throw Spirit Bomb. Allies gain the bonus ability Donate Energy+ until you throw it.

translation.ru_description:
Начните заряжать бомбу. Способность меняется на "Бросок Бомбы Духа".
Союзники получают способность "Пожертвовать Энергию".
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Начните заряжать бомбу. Способность меняется на "Бросок Бомбы Духа".
Союзники получают способность "Пожертвовать Энергию+".
translation.en_description:
Begin charging a spirit bomb. This ability becomes Throw Spirit Bomb.
Allies gain the bonus ability Donate Energy until you throw it.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Begin charging a spirit bomb. This ability becomes Throw Spirit Bomb.
Allies gain the bonus ability Donate Energy+ until you throw it.

abilities.description: Become downed. You don't get injured. At the end of the next round, you're revived with 1 HP, 15 , and All Stats Up.Upgraded: Become downed. You don't get injured. At the end of the next round, you're revived with 50% HP, 20 , 2 , and All Stats Up 2.

translation.ru_description: Вырубитесь. Вы не травмируетесь. В конце след. раунда воскресните с 1 ОЗ, 15 [img:shield] и Повышением Всех Характеристик.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Вырубитесь. Не травмируетесь. Воскресните с 50% ОЗ, 20 [img:shield], 2 [img:divineshield] и Повышением Всех Характеристик 2.
translation.en_description: Become downed. You don't get injured. At the end of the next round, you're revived with 1 HP, 15 [img:shield], and All Stats Up.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Become downed. You don't get injured. At the end of the next round, you're revived with 50% HP, 20 [img:shield], 2 [img:divineshield], and All Stats Up 2.

abilities.description: Give +1 damage to the Spirit Bomb!Upgraded: Give +2 damage to the Spirit Bomb!

translation.ru_description: Дайте +1 урона Бомбе Духа!
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте +2 урона Бомбе Духа!
translation.en_description: Give +1 damage to the Spirit Bomb!
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give +2 damage to the Spirit Bomb!

abilities.description: Summon a 1 HP illusion of yourself within three tiles that mimics your basic attack, but in the opposite direction of you. It dies at the end of your turn.Upgraded: Summon a 1 HP illusion of yourself on any tile that mimics your basic attack, but in the opposite direction of you. It dies at the end of your turn.

translation.ru_description: Призовите иллюзию (1 ОЗ) рядом, которая повторяет вашу базовую атаку, но в противоположную сторону. Умирает в конце хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Призовите иллюзию (1 ОЗ) где угодно, которая повторяет вашу базовую атаку в противоположную сторону.
translation.en_description: Summon a 1 HP illusion of yourself within three tiles that mimics your basic attack, but in the opposite direction of you. It dies at the end of your turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Summon a 1 HP illusion of yourself on any tile that mimics your basic attack, but in the opposite direction of you. It dies at the end of your turn.

abilities.description: You can't cast spells for the rest of the battle. For the rest of the battle, whenever you kill an enemy, take an extra turn.Upgraded: You can't cast spells for the rest of the battle. For the rest of the battle, whenever you kill an enemy, take an extra turn. Get an extra turn when you cast this.

translation.ru_description:
Вы не можете колдовать до конца битвы.
Зато теперь после каждого убийства врага вы получаете доп. ход.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Вы не можете колдовать до конца битвы.
Зато теперь после каждого убийства врага вы получаете доп. ход.
Дает доп. ход сразу при применении.
translation.en_description:
You can't cast spells for the rest of the battle.
For the rest of the battle, whenever you kill an enemy, take an extra turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
You can't cast spells for the rest of the battle.
For the rest of the battle, whenever you kill an enemy, take an extra turn.
Get an extra turn when you cast this.

abilities.description: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it.Upgraded: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it. This has a chance to repeat multiple times.

translation.ru_description: Телепорт к случайному врагу, смена стойки на Ближнюю и авто-атака.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепорт к случайному врагу, смена стойки на Ближнюю и авто-атака. Может повториться несколько раз.
translation.en_description: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it. This has a chance to repeat multiple times.

abilities.description: Jump to a tile, then gain +2 for each enemy adjacent to the tile you land on.Upgraded: Jump to any tile, then gain +2 for each enemy adjacent to the tile you land on.

translation.ru_description: Прыгните, затем получите +2 [img:shield] за каждого врага рядом с местом посадки.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Прыгните куда угодно, затем получите +2 [img:shield] за каждого врага рядом с местом посадки.
translation.en_description: Jump to a tile, then gain +2 [img:shield] for each enemy adjacent to the tile you land on.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Jump to any tile, then gain +2 [img:shield] for each enemy adjacent to the tile you land on.

abilities.description: Gain +1 temporary Kinetic Spikes.Upgraded: Gain +2 temporary Kinetic Spikes.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите +2 временные Кинетические Шипы.
translation.en_description: Gain +1 temporary Kinetic Spikes.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain +2 temporary Kinetic Spikes.

abilities.description: Gain +1 Intelligence and +1 . If you have 7 or more Shield, this spell costs 1 mana less.Upgraded: Gain +1 Intelligence and +2 . If you have 7 or more , this spell costs 1 mana less.

translation.ru_description:
Получите +1 [img:int] и +1 [img:shield].
Если у вас 7+ [img:shield], стоит на 1 ману дешевле.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Получите +1 [img:int] и +2 [img:shield].
Если у вас 7+ [img:shield], стоит на 1 ману дешевле.

If you have 7 or more [img:shield], this spell costs 1 mana less.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Gain +1 [img:int] and +2 [img:shield].
If you have 7 or more [img:shield], this spell costs 1 mana less.

abilities.description: Inflict Marked and Magic Weakness 1 on a unit.Upgraded: Inflict Marked 3 and Magic Weakness 3 on a unit.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Метку 3 и Магическую Слабость 3 на юнита.
translation.en_description: Inflict Marked and Magic Weakness 1 on a unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Marked 3 and Magic Weakness 3 on a unit.

abilities.description: Gain +20 Movement Range until the end of the turn.Upgraded: Gain +20 Movement Range until the end of the turn and refresh your movement action.

translation.ru_description: Получите +20 к Дальности Перемещения до конца хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите +20 к Дальности Перемещения и обновите действие движения.
translation.en_description: Gain +20 Movement Range until the end of the turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain +20 Movement Range until the end of the turn and refresh your movement action.

abilities.description: Gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until your next turn.Upgraded: Gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until your next turn. Also reflect the next projectile you're hit by.

translation.en_description: Gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until your next turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until your next turn. Also reflect the next projectile you're hit by.

abilities.description: Teleport exactly two tiles away, then switch stances.Upgraded: Teleport two to four tiles away, then switch stances.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепортируйтесь на 2-4 клетки, затем смените стойку.
translation.en_description: Teleport exactly two tiles away, then switch stances.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport two to four tiles away, then switch stances.

Upgraded: Gain +8 and knock back adjacent units two tiles. This spell costs 3 mana less and grants 1 extra for each action you've taken this turn. (Castable once per turn.)

Получите +8 [img:shield] и отбросьте соседей на 2 клетки. Стоит на 3 маны меньше за каждое действие в этот ход.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]

Получите +8 [img:shield] и отбросьте соседей. Стоит на 3 маны меньше и дает +1 [img:shield] за каждое действие в этот ход.

translation.ru_upgraded_description:

abilities.description: Gain Strength and Dexterity equal to your until the end of your turn.Upgraded: Convert your to Strength and Dexterity for the rest of the battle.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите ваш [img:shield] в [img:str] и [img:dex] до конца битвы.

translation.en_upgraded_description: Convert your [img:shield] to [img:str] and [img:dex] for the rest of the battle.

abilities.description: Summon a half-sized copy of yourself with half your stats. It's AI-controlled and can't use spells.Upgraded: Summon a half-sized copy of yourself with half your stats. It's AI-controlled and CAN use spells.

abilities.description: Cleanse your debuffs and gain +1 .Upgraded: Cleanse your debuffs and gain +1 . At the end of each round, automatically cast this spell for free.
